details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest .com "garden" domain with 1-year + privacy to cart
Task 2 (adapted): Add two available "garden" domains (8-12 chars) under $18 from search to cart
Task 3: Choose cheapest shared hosting plan with >=3 websites and >=50GB for 1 year
Task 4: Select business e-commerce package under $1000 and create project request
Task 5: Create and publish 3-page portfolio site using 4+ star template
Task 6 (adapted): Start store site from highest-rated template
Task 7 (adapted): Add two highest-traffic domains to wishlist via premium domain flow
Task 8: Configure DNS - update root A record and add www CNAME
Task 9: Renew cheapest domain expiring within 60 days for 3 years
